rulings.Case Title: ONEZIME PITRE JR VS. SHALITHA MITCHELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses To Admissions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 06, 2016 line 10. PLAINTIFF ONEZIME PITRE Mtn To Compel Responses To Admissions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admission are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110. = (501/REQ)
